sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46893" key="h(liose/lhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡλιοσέληνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n46893.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sunstone</tr_>, imitatur quodammodo congressum solis etlunae, figuratque colore, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de sacrificio et magia</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">101</biblScope> </bibl> (Kroll <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Analecta Gr.</tr_>, Greifsw.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1901p.8</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
